Hero.label: STRATEGIC LOGISTICS PARTNER AT TA LUNG INTERNATIONAL BORDER GATE
Hero.title:
CONNECTING BORDERS
REACHING THE WORLD
Hero.subtitle: Established since 2008, Ta Lung Quang Minh proudly delivers safe, fast, and cost-optimized solutions in customs clearance, warehousing, and multimodal transportation.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Over a decade of building seamless supply chains at Ta Lung International Border Gate

intro.title: COMPANY OVERVIEW
intro.content:
Founded in 2008 as Ta Lung Quang Minh Trading & Transport Co., Ltd., Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company has rapidly grown into a leading logistics force in the border region. Capitalizing on the Vietnam-China trade flow through Ta Lung International Border Gate, we have heavily invested in world-class warehousing and cargo consolidation facilities.

Our comprehensive service ecosystem covers: Warehousing, Truck Terminal, Customs Brokerage, and International Multimodal Transportation.

AboutPage.missionText: Our mission is to remove all customs clearance barriers and optimize supply chains through transparency and speed. Our strategic vision is to become the most important link in the Vietnam-China economic corridor.

timeline.stage1_text: Established Ta Lung Quang Minh Trading & Transport Co., Ltd., laying the foundation for cross-border trade transportation services.
timeline.stage2_text: Transformed into Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company, expanded infrastructure to 25 hectares, and set new standards in customs clearance.
timeline.stage3_text: Complete integration of Ta Lung - Chi Ma border gate system, creating a comprehensive logistics service chain along the border.

facilities.warehouseContent: We own three strategic yards: Ta Lung Quang Minh, Vu Thanh, and Son Cang, with a total area of 25 hectares. The infrastructure is designed as a closed system, fully meeting the strictest standards for storage and transloading of heavy cargo.
facilities.transportContent: Operating a large fleet with various load capacities, ready to flexibly and safely meet all multimodal transportation needs of businesses.

1.title: Receipt & Assessment
1.desc: Receive plans, documents, and provide optimal solution consulting

2.title: Customs Declaration
2.desc: Handle legal procedures and ultra-fast customs clearance

3.title: Vehicle Coordination
3.desc: Route and direct vehicles to dedicated transloading areas

4.title: Safe Transloading
4.desc: Transload cargo using modern equipment and a professional team

5.title: Completion & Handover
5.desc: Complete exit procedures and track the final leg of the journey

vision.title: FUTURE DIRECTION
vision.content:
Ta Lung Quang Minh is undergoing strong transformation, focusing on digitalizing processes and comprehensively upgrading logistics warehousing infrastructure.

Our ambition goes beyond Ta Lung. Our long-term goal is to seamlessly connect business operations with the Ta Lung and Chi Ma border gates, establishing a fully integrated border service corridor. This will solidify our position as a key hub connecting Vietnam-China trade.

offices.caobang: Ta Lung International Border Gate, Phuc Hoa Commune, Cao Bang Province

LatestNews.title: News & Events
LatestNews.seoContent:
Welcome to the news section of <bold>Ta Lung Logistics</bold>. Here, we provide the latest information on company news, import-export policies, new regulations at <bold>Ta Lung International Border Gate</bold>, and international transportation trends.

Timely awareness of changes in customs procedures and border clearance status is vital for businesses to avoid cargo delay risks. The expert team at Ta Lung Quang Minh continuously compiles and analyzes market information to deliver the most valuable insights to our clients.

WhyChooseUs.title: Proven Success
WhyChooseUs.point1Text: Own 25 hectares of cargo yards equipped with state-of-the-art loading and unloading equipment at the heart of the trading zone.
WhyChooseUs.point2Text: Our expert team has deep knowledge of border trade policies and can flexibly handle all customs situations 24/7.
WhyChooseUs.point3Text: We commit to minimizing storage time, with clear procedures and fully transparent costs with no hidden fees.

Partners.title: Trusted partner of hundreds of import-export enterprises

ContactPage.title: Connect With Us
ContactPage.description: The Ta Lung Quang Minh team is always ready to listen and solve every supply chain challenge you face. Contact us today.

faq.q1: What is the average customs clearance processing time?
faq.a1: With complete documents and proper preparation, customs procedures at Ta Lung Quang Minh yards are typically completed in under 2 working hours.
faq.q2: Do you support transloading of special cargo?
faq.a2: Yes, we do. With diverse equipment and 25 hectares of space, we can safely handle all types of cargo from agricultural products and minerals to oversized and heavy machinery.
faq.q3: Can we request inland waterway or railway transportation?
faq.a3: Yes. Ta Lung Quang Minh offers multimodal transportation solutions, flexibly combining road, waterway, and rail to optimize costs according to your needs.

ManifestoPage.title: Our Values
ManifestoPage.subtitle: CONNECTING BORDERS - REACHING THE WORLD
ManifestoPage.value1Text: All processes from quotation to customs clearance are standardized. Customers have full visibility of costs and cargo routes.
ManifestoPage.value2Text: Time is our customers’ profit. We respond quickly to resolve every bottleneck in operations.
ManifestoPage.value3Text: Our partners’ success is the true measure of our capability. We aim for long-term strategic partnerships.
ManifestoPage.value4Text: Business operations must go hand in hand with environmental protection and contribution to the prosperity of the border economy.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.content:
Welcome to the official website of Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company.

By accessing and using this website, you are deemed to have understood and accepted the following terms.

### 1. USER OBLIGATIONS
- Ensure the accuracy and truthfulness of all information provided through quotation, application, or contact forms.
- Strictly prohibit the distribution of malware, interference, or unauthorized access to our database systems.

### 2. COPYRIGHT AND INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
- All content, brand identity, images, and source code on this website are intellectual property of Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company.
- Any copying, distribution, or commercial use without written permission is strictly prohibited and illegal.

### 3. DISCLAIMER
- Information on the website is for illustrative and introductory purposes. Actual operational terms may vary depending on contracts and real conditions. We are not legally responsible for decisions made solely based on website content without direct consultation.

### 4. RIGHT TO UPDATE
The company reserves the right to modify, update, or delete these terms at any time without prior notice.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.content:
Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company highly values and commits to strictly protecting personal data and business information of our partners.

### 1. SCOPE OF DATA COLLECTION
The system only records data voluntarily provided by users through forms (including: full name, phone number, email, request content) and anonymous access data (cookies) for statistical purposes.

### 2. PURPOSE OF USE
Collected data is used solely for:
- Analyzing requests and providing consultation and quotations.
- Supporting the resolution of operational issues.
- Improving user experience on the website.

### 3. CONFIDENTIALITY COMMITMENT
We apply the most advanced data encryption standards. All customer information is stored in our internal system and is strictly NOT sold, exchanged, or transferred to any third party, except when required by competent authorities in accordance with the law.

### 4. USER RIGHTS
You have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information from our system at any time via our official support email: **info@talunglogistics.com**.
